_comment: Species: Web Weaver Spider (织网蛛) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Web Weaver Spider

canonical.appearance: Spider 3 m legspan, web silk is spirit-steel strong, eight eyes glow in patterns
canonical.size: 3 m adult, 400 jin; ancient 10 m, 8000 jin
canonical.behavior: Spins webs across valleys; webs trap cultivators by cultivation base; cultivates by counting trapped souls
canonical.habitat: Forest valleys, fog marshes, web-canopied spirit-herb groves
canonical.diet: trapped cultivators, weaker beasts, web-caught birds
canonical.relationships: Rival of giant centipedes; tamed by binding-sects
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: web_weaver_spider — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
